common.qmsPackage: Paquete de sistema de gestión de la calidad:
common.disclaimer: Este es un borrador asistido por IA únicamente para soporte de documentación, no para aprobación regulatoria. Se requiere revisión final por parte de una persona calificada/organismo notificado.
exports.languageHint: Each language is exported as a separate file. English documents are marked with an "e" revision suffix (e.g. v1.0e).
composer.title: Compositor de documentos de IA
composer.desc: Genere borradores de documentos regulatorios de nivel consultor a partir de datos y evidencia de su producto.
dashboard.title: Panel
dashboard.desc: Preparación regulatoria en toda su cartera de productos.
products.title: Products
products.desc: Your medical device portfolio and per-device documentation status.
products.form.title: New product
products.form.desc: Define your medical device. You can refine every detail later in the product dossier.
products.form.name: Product / technical file name
products.form.nameHint: One technical file can cover a whole device family (multiple brands and models).
products.form.variantsHint: Add each brand, its models, and the sterilization method(s) per model (a model can be both EO and Gamma).
products.form.bulkAdd: Bulk add models (one code per line, e.g. YM-240, YM-240-R, YM-250)
products.form.bulkSterHint: Apply to all (…-R models → Gamma, others → EO when both selected):
products.form.suggestHint: AI drafts only the descriptive fields (intended purpose, materials, standards) from the device type. Identity fields (brands, models, sterilization) are never invented. Review before saving.
products.form.suggestDoneAi: AI draft added. Please review and edit the descriptive fields before saving.
products.form.suggestDoneFallback: Template draft added (AI not configured). Please review and edit before saving.
products.form.suggestError: Could not generate a draft. Please try again.
products.form.suggestNeedsName: Enter the product name first — the AI tailors the draft to it.
products.edit.title: Edit product
products.edit.desc: Manually enter identity and regulatory fields, or use AI to draft the descriptive ones. Review before saving.
products.edit.error: Could not save the product. Please try again.
products.edit.identityHint: These are real identifiers — AI never fills them. Basic UDI-DI / UDI-DI come from your GS1/EUDAMED records.
products.edit.characteristicsHint: These flags drive which technical-file sections and GSPRs apply. Items that do not apply are auto-marked 'Not applicable'.
products.edit.sterilizationNote: Edit brands, models and sterilization methods in the device-family section below.
products.form.intendedPurposePlaceholder: Describe the clinical need this device addresses.
products.form.userProfilePlaceholder: e.g. trained clinician / surgeon / nurse, or lay user; required training and environment.
products.form.patientPopulationPlacehold: e.g. adult / paediatric, indication, anatomy and key exclusions.
products.form.error: Could not create the product. Please try again.
technicalFile.title: Technical File Generator
technicalFile.desc: MDR Annex II / III structure with per-section status, owners and AI gap analysis.
gspr.title: GSPR Checklist
gspr.desc: MDR Annex I — map each requirement to evidence. Missing evidence is highlighted in red.
gspr.withEvidenceHint: Linked file or manual evidence text (auto hints excluded)
gspr.status.err.justification: Justification is required before review or approval.
gspr.status.err.evidence: Real evidence (file or manual note) is required before review or approval.
gspr.status.err.evidenceAutoHint: The grey text is an auto-suggested hint only. Link a file (+) or enter a manual evidence note before review or approval.
gspr.evidenceAutoHintBadge: Auto hint — add file or note
gspr.status.err.transition: This status change is not allowed. Complete justification and evidence first, or choose an intermediate step.
gspr.status.err.approveRole: Quality Manager role is required to approve GSPR rows.
gspr.api.err.bodyRequired: Justification, evidence or status is required.
risk.title: ISO 14971 Risk Management
risk.desc: ISO 14971 risk management file: plan, report, policy, Annex A questions and FMEA table.
risk.add.title: Add risk item
risk.edit.title: Edit risk item
risk.audit.title: ISO 14971 risk file audit
risk.audit.subtitle: AI-assisted gap analysis and hazard suggestions
risk.audit.useAiAddHint: To add suggested hazards to the table, use “Add risks with AI” above the table.
risk.aiAdd.none: No new hazards to add — table already covers AI suggestions.
risk.tpl.empty: No risk items yet. Add manually or use “Add risks with AI”.
risk.fmea.benefitRisk.placeholder: Overall risk/benefit analysis for the FMEA table…
risk.fmea.benefitRisk.needsRisks: Add FMEA rows first, then generate the analysis.
risk.tableE.title: Table E.1 / E.2 — Hazard catalogue & initiating events
risk.tableE.desc: ISO/TR 24971 hazard examples (E.1) and initiating events (E.2). «A» rows link to FMEA risk codes (category initials + no.).
risk.tableE.applicableCount: {n} applicable (A) row(s) across E.1 and E.2
risk.mgmt.plan.desc: ISO 14971 risk management plan: scope, responsibilities, risk acceptability criteria and verification activities.
risk.mgmt.plan.generateDesc: AI generates a product-specific draft using MD-RM-01 section headings, then export as Word.
risk.mgmt.plan.uploadDesc: Upload your completed Risk Management Plan document (Word or PDF).
risk.mgmt.report.generateDesc: AI generates a product-specific report using fixed MD-RM-04 section headings, then export as Word.
risk.mgmt.report.uploadDesc: Upload your completed Risk Management Report document (Word or PDF).
risk.mgmt.upload.empty: No file uploaded yet. Use the button below to upload your document.
risk.mgmt.upload.typeMismatch: This file looks like {detected}, not {expected}. It was linked to this tab anyway.
risk.mgmt.report.title: Risk Management Report
risk.mgmt.report.desc: Summary of the risk management process, residual risks and overall benefit-risk conclusion.
risk.mgmt.policy.title: Risk Management Policy
risk.mgmt.policy.desc: Organizational policy for risk management, roles and linkage to the quality management system.
risk.mgmt.policy.generateDesc: AI generates a product-specific policy using fixed MD-RM-05 section headings, then export as Word.
risk.mgmt.policy.uploadDesc: Upload your completed Risk Management Policy document (Word or PDF).
risk.mgmt.generate.error: Could not generate document. Please try again.
risk.mgmt.generate.aiFallback: Live AI was not used — template draft was saved instead. Restart the dev server after .env changes, or check API key / model settings.
risk.mgmt.upload.ownDesc: Use your company Word/PDF template instead of the generated draft.
risk.mgmt.annexA.title: Annex A Question List
risk.mgmt.annexA.desc: ISO/TR 24971 Annex A — 46 safety-related characteristics (A.2.1–A.2.37). Identify hazards from device properties.
risk.mgmt.fmea.title: Failure Mode and Effects Analysis Table
risk.mgmt.fmea.desc: Hazardous situations, risk scores, mitigation measures (design / production / post-market) and residual risk assessment.
risk.mgmt.fmea.narrativesFilled: Updated {n} row narrative(s); row numbers reordered.
risk.mgmt.templateHint: Product-specific: AI fills Plan, Policy and Report (Word export) or upload your own files. Auto-fill also covers Annex A and FMEA.
risk.autoFill.nothing: All sections already have content — no changes.
risk.wordDocs.title: Word export
risk.wordDocs.desc: AI drafts and your uploaded files. Download Word exports or open uploaded documents.
risk.annexA.col.question: Question
risk.annexA.aiDone: Annex A table filled with AI.
risk.annexA.aiDoneRules: Annex A table filled from templates.
risk.annexA.aiError: Could not fill Annex A. Please try again.
tf.section.general-info: Manufacturer Identification, UDI-DI / Basic UDI-DI and EUDAMED Registration
tf.section.previous-generations: Reference to Previous and Similar Generations
tf.section.info-supplied: Information Supplied by the Manufacturer (Label and IFU)
tf.section.suppliers: Suppliers, Critical Subcontractors and Manufacturing Sites
tf.section.standards-list: List of Applied Harmonised Standards and Common Specifications
tf.section.gspr: General Safety and Performance Requirements (GSPR Checklist)
tf.section.sscp: Summary of Safety and Clinical Performance (SSCP)
tf.section.implant-card: Implant Card and Information Supplied to the Patient
tf.generateError: Could not draft this section. Please try again.
tf.draftSaved: Saved as draft. Review and edit before approval.
gspr.evidenceManualPlaceholder: e.g. Risk management file (ISO 14971), test report ref. …
gspr.evidenceManualHint: Describe the evidence document; you can link a file from the File Center later.
gspr.justification.placeholder: Document why this requirement applies (or how it is addressed)…
gspr.justification.naPlaceholder: Reason why this requirement does not apply…
gspr.autoFill.running: Scanning standards, files and filling justifications…
gspr.autoFill.runningAi: AI is writing detailed justifications from your dossier and files…
gspr.autoFill.nothing: GSPR already up to date — no changes made.
gspr.autoFill.noPermission: Consultant role required to auto-fill GSPR.
gspr.incompleteList: This product has {current} of {total} MDR Annex I GSPR rows — run dossier sync or re-save the product to backfill missing items.
gspr.incompleteHint: Click “Auto-fill from standards & files” to add missing rows and populate standards.
gspr.statusLegend: Status: Missing = no real evidence and no justification; Draft = content added; In Review = submitted for QM check; Approved = manually confirmed by Quality Manager. Auto-fill hints alone do not count as evidence.
gspr.statusLegendNa: Not-applicable rows ({n}) are excluded from the summary counts.
gspr.req.1: Devices shall achieve their intended performance and be safe and effective; risks acceptable when weighed against benefits.
gspr.req.2: Reduce risks as far as possible (AFAP) through safe design and manufacture, without adversely affecting the benefit-risk ratio.
gspr.req.3: Establish, implement, document and maintain a risk management system across the whole device lifecycle.
gspr.req.4: Risk control hierarchy: eliminate/reduce by design, then protective measures/alarms, then information for safety and training.
gspr.req.5: Eliminate or reduce risks related to use error and ergonomic/usability features (use environment and user characteristics).
gspr.req.6: Device characteristics and performance shall not be adversely affected during the stated lifetime under normal use.
gspr.req.7: Design, manufacture and packaging to protect against risks during transport and storage per the manufacturer's information.
gspr.req.8: All known and foreseeable risks and undesirable side-effects minimised and acceptable against the benefits (overall benefit-risk).
gspr.req.9: Devices without an intended medical purpose (Annex XVI): no risk, or no greater than the corresponding medical device.
gspr.req.10.1: Chemical, physical and biological properties; choice of materials; toxicity, flammability and biocompatibility (ISO 10993).
gspr.req.10.2: Compatibility between materials and biological tissues, cells and body fluids, considering the intended purpose.
gspr.req.10.3: Minimise risks from substances or particles, including wear debris, released from the device.
gspr.req.10.4: CMR (carcinogenic, mutagenic, reprotoxic) and endocrine-disrupting substances >0.1% w/w: justification and labelling.
gspr.req.10.5: Minimise risks from unintended ingress or egress of substances into or out of the device.
gspr.req.10.6: Reduce risks linked to the size and properties of particles, including nanomaterials.
gspr.req.11.1: Eliminate or reduce as far as possible the risk of infection to patient, user and third parties.
gspr.req.11.2: Sterile devices designed, manufactured and packaged so the sterile condition is maintained until use.
gspr.req.11.3: Devices supplied in a defined microbial state shall be labelled accordingly.
gspr.req.11.4: Sterile devices processed, manufactured, packaged and sterilised by appropriate validated methods.
gspr.req.11.5: Devices to be sterilised before use manufactured and packaged to minimise microbial contamination.
gspr.req.11.6: Labelling shall distinguish identical or similar devices placed on the market in both sterile and non-sterile conditions.
gspr.req.11.7: Minimise risks from substances of biological origin; control of source, collection, processing and preservation.
gspr.req.12.1: Devices incorporating a medicinal substance with ancillary action: safety, quality and usefulness of the substance verified.
gspr.req.13.1: Devices incorporating materials of biological origin (human/animal/microbial): origin, processing and viral safety controlled.
gspr.req.14.1: Devices used in combination with other devices/equipment shall be safe and not impair the specified performance.
gspr.req.14.2: Reduce risks from external influences and environmental conditions (magnetic fields, electrical, pressure, temperature, humidity).
gspr.req.14.5: Reduce the risk of fire or explosion during normal use and in single-fault condition.
gspr.req.14.6: Devices shall allow safe adjustment, calibration and maintenance where these are required.
gspr.req.14.7: Enable safe disposal of the device and any waste substances by the user, patient or third party.
gspr.req.15.1: Devices with a diagnostic or measuring function: sufficient accuracy, precision and stability for the intended purpose.
gspr.req.15.2: Measurements expressed in legal units of measurement and understood by the intended user.
gspr.req.16.1: Reduce exposure of patients, users and others to radiation as far as possible, compatible with the intended purpose.
gspr.req.16.2: Intended radiation emission shall be controllable/adjustable with display or indication of the dose delivered.
gspr.req.17.1: Electronic programmable systems and software: ensure repeatability, reliability and performance per the intended use.
gspr.req.17.2: Software developed and manufactured per state of the art: lifecycle, risk management, verification and validation (IEC 62304).
gspr.req.17.3: Software on mobile/computing platforms: minimum hardware, IT characteristics and network requirements defined.
gspr.req.17.4: Information security: protect against unauthorised access; minimum requirements for IT security/cybersecurity (MDCG 2019-16).
gspr.req.18.1: Active devices and connected devices: minimise risks in single-fault condition.
gspr.req.18.4: Devices with an internal energy source: indication of the state of the energy source / low-battery warning.
gspr.req.18.5: Devices connected to an external energy source: alarm for power failure.
gspr.req.18.8: Alarm systems for hazardous situations clearly perceivable by the user under foreseeable use conditions.
gspr.req.19.1: Devices with a measuring function - accuracy and limits.
gspr.req.20.1: Protection against mechanical risks (movement, instability and moving parts).
gspr.req.20.2: Reduce risks arising from vibration generated by the device.
gspr.req.20.3: Reduce risks arising from noise emitted by the device.
gspr.req.20.4: Terminals and connectors designed and constructed to minimise the risk of incorrect connection.
gspr.req.20.5: Accessible parts (excluding energy-delivery parts) shall not reach potentially dangerous temperatures.
gspr.req.21.1: Devices supplying energy or substances to the patient: set and maintain accuracy sufficient for safety.
gspr.req.21.2: Prevent or indicate inadequate delivery that could pose a danger; guard against accidental release of hazardous levels.
gspr.req.22.1: Devices for lay users designed to perform appropriately given the user's skills, means and environment.
gspr.req.22.2: Reduce the risk of use error and of misinterpretation of results by lay users.
gspr.req.22.3: Self-testing/self-administration devices: include a procedure for the user to verify correct operation.
gspr.req.23.1: General requirements for information supplied by the manufacturer (label + IFU): medium, format, language, legibility.
gspr.req.23.2: Information on the label (name, UDI, manufacturer/EU rep, sterility, lot/serial, warnings, special storage).
gspr.req.23.3: Information on the packaging which maintains the sterile condition ('sterile packaging').
gspr.req.23.4: Information in the instructions for use (intended purpose, residual risks, warnings, performance, disposal).
qmWizard.desc: Answer guided questions and let AI Composer draft your ISO 9001 / ISO 13485 Quality Manual.
qmWizard.disclaimer: The wizard produces a consultant-grade DRAFT. A qualified person must review and approve it; it does not grant certification.
qmWizard.empty.title: No wizard sessions yet
qmWizard.empty.desc: Start a guided Quality Manual wizard to collect inputs and generate a draft.
qmWizard.detailDesc: Guided intake → gap check → AI-generated draft.
consultant.title: Compliance Consultant
consultant.desc: AI regulatory consultant — find gaps, prioritize actions and get a 30-day plan.
consultant.empty.title: No analysis yet
consultant.emptyDesc: Select a product and standard, then run Analyze Compliance to see your readiness dashboard.
auditSim.title: Audit Simulator
auditSim.desc: Simulate a certification audit — answer auditor questions and get scored findings & CAPA.
auditSim.empty.title: No audits yet
auditSim.empty.desc: Start a simulated audit to assess certification readiness.
standards.desc: Standard summaries, clause requirements and your licensed/internal documents power AI citations.
standards.empty.title: No standards yet
standards.empty.desc: Seed the knowledge base or upload your licensed standards / procedures.
standards.selectDesc: Choose a standard to view its clause requirements.
composer.empty.title: Aún no hay documentos
composer.empty.desc: Genere su primer borrador de documento regulatorio asistido por IA.
filesView.empty.title: No files
filesView.empty.desc: Uploaded evidence files will appear here with AI analysis and suggested links.
product.tab.cer.title: No Clinical Evaluation Report yet
product.tab.cer.desc: Generate a CER outline with AI, then attach clinical data and literature appraisal.
product.tab.pms.title: PMS / PMCF plans not configured
product.tab.pms.desc: Class IIa/IIb/III devices require active surveillance. Generate a proportionate plan with AI.
product.tab.ifu.title: No IFU or label generated yet
product.tab.ifu.desc: Generate IFU content and a label layout, then verify warnings match the risk file.
product.tab.tests.title: No test reports uploaded
product.tab.tests.desc: Upload biocompatibility, sterilization, packaging or electrical safety reports in the File Center to link them as GSPR evidence.
product.tab.quality.title: No quality records linked
product.tab.quality.desc: Link CAPAs, complaints, design controls and supplier records to this device.
vv.title: Verification & validation (V&V)
vv.desc: Track design verification and validation tests per Annex II §6.1 and link evidence to the technical file.
vv.disclaimer: Test records support the technical file; they do not replace formal test reports or notified body review.
quality.noRecords: No quality records linked to this device yet.
suppliers.title: Approved supplier list
suppliers.desc: ISO 13485 §7.4.1 — approved suppliers with re-evaluation dates.
suppliers.name: Supplier name
docControl.title: Document control & approvals
docControl.desc: ISO 13485 §4.2.4 — controlled documents with formal approval records (intent-based electronic sign-off).
docControl.intentPlaceholder: I, [name/role], confirm I have reviewed this document and approve revision … for release.
docControl.intentTooShort: Approval intent must be at least 10 characters.
docControl.notInReview: Document must be In Review before approval.
docControl.workflowStartHint: This document is In Review but has no workflow yet. Start the 3-step chain: Reviewer → Approver → Release.
docControl.workflowExists: Workflow already exists for this revision.
docControl.workflowComplete: All approval steps completed — document is approved.
docControl.priorStepIncomplete: Complete the previous approval step first.
docControl.stepNotPending: This step is no longer pending.
dhf.desc: ISO 13485 §7.3 design history file — inputs, outputs, reviews, verification, validation and transfer.
cyber.title: Cybersecurity file
cyber.desc: MDCG 2019-16 / GSPR 17.4 — threat model, SBOM, vulnerability and patch management.
sw62304.title: Software lifecycle (IEC 62304)
sw62304.desc: Software safety class, development plan, requirements, V&V and maintenance.
sw62304.class.C: Class C — death or serious injury possible
udi.title: UDI & EUDAMED
udi.desc: GS1 UDI payload, Data Matrix preview and EUDAMED registration readiness.
consultant.noPermission: Your role cannot run consultant analyses.
executive.title: Executive Dashboard
pd.gsprStructure: MDR Annex I — General Safety & Performance Requirements
pd.aiAssistantDesc: Ask classification, gap, validation and audit questions scoped to
pd.field.emdnCode.help: European Medical Device Nomenclature code (used in Declaration of Conformity).
pd.field.productPhoto.hint: PNG or JPEG, max 5 MB. Shown in the Declaration of Conformity model table. Per-model images can also be placed in public/product-photos/.
pd.ai.ifu: Audit IFU & label against dossier and risk file
clinical.title: Clinical Evaluation
clinical.desc: MDR Annex XIV / MEDDEV 2.7/1 — generate a full CER draft from product and risk data, then complete literature search and equivalence evidence.
clinical.saveTooLarge: Section text is too long. Remove duplicate tables or evidence blocks and save again.
clinical.draftDone: CER sections, literature strategy and clinical findings prepared as draft.
clinical.workflow.title: CER approval workflow
clinical.workflow.hint: Complete literature, findings and sections, then submit for review.
clinical.workflow.locked: Sections are locked while in review.
clinical.gap.title: Claim — evidence — gap matrix
clinical.gap.desc: Formal MDR gap table linking claims, evidence, gaps and PMCF actions.
clinical.gap.empty: No gap matrix yet — save literature or equivalent data, or click Refresh.
clinical.qp.title: Clinical evaluator (QP)
clinical.qp.desc: CV summary and conflict-of-interest declaration for the CER annex.
clinical.qp.coiDeclared: I declare no conflict of interest (or disclose below)
cer.status.err.transition: This status change is not allowed.
cer.status.err.locked: CER is locked — reopen or create a new revision after rejection.
cer.status.err.readiness: Clinical readiness must be at least 70% before review.
cer.status.err.literature: Run MDRpilot literature search before submitting.
cer.status.err.studies: At least 3 clinical finding rows are required.
cer.status.err.report: CER report section must be completed.
cer.status.err.approveRole: Quality Manager role is required to approve CER.
clinical.lit.outcomesHelp: What you search for (safety, performance). Actual findings go in the Clinical data tab.
clinical.lit.resultsHint: MDRpilot runs the literature search and national registry screening here. Results sync to Clinical data for the CER summary. Review and verify against live databases before approval.
clinical.lit.meddocHint: Generates PICO, search query, PRISMA counts, scientific summary and national registry outcomes (FDA MAUDE, BfArM, MHRA, EUDAMED, TİTCK…) from your product profile and risk file.
clinical.lit.generateError: Could not run MDRpilot literature search.
clinical.lit.registryStatus.noneHelp: No new or unexpected device-specific safety signal in this registry search (draft — verify live query).
clinical.lit.registryStatus.reviewHelp: Manual review of registry results recommended before approval.
clinical.lit.registryStatus.foundHelp: Relevant vigilance record(s) found — assess in risk file and benefit-risk.
clinical.lit.meddocDisclaimer: Draft prepared by MDRpilot from product data — verify against live PubMed, MAUDE, BfArM and other registry queries before regulatory submission.
clinical.lit.databasesRegulatoryHint: FDA MAUDE, FDA recalls, BfArM, MHRA, EUDAMED, TİTCK and similar sources required for PMS-aligned clinical evaluation.
clinical.lit.includedStudiesHint: PRISMA included (n={n}): each study becomes one row in Clinical data and exports to Word individually.
clinical.studies.sourcePlaceholder: PubMed / FDA MAUDE / Smith et al., 2023
clinical.studies.nHelp: Literature: included studies (PRISMA). Registries: records screened. Risk row: FMEA line count.
clinical.studies.hint: Use «Prepare findings» to auto-generate rows for each selected registry (FDA MAUDE, BfArM, literature, risk file). Review and adjust before approval.
clinical.equiv.hint: Live FDA openFDA 510(k) search for predicate / equivalent devices. Attach query screenshots as evidence; each device exports to Word with equivalence table.
clinical.equiv.liveSearchBadge: Live openFDA query — {n} matching 510(k) records in database
clinical.equiv.evidenceScreenshotsHint: Upload FDA search results or 510(k) detail page screenshots (PNG/JPEG). Included in Word export.
clinical.equiv.empty: No equivalent devices yet — run MDRpilot search or add manually.
clinical.equiv.tableFieldsHint: Subject product column is filled from product profile; edit equivalent column values below.
clinical.readiness.title: CER readiness
clinical.readiness.desc: Complete items below before regulatory submission.
clinical.readiness.done: All readiness items complete — review draft before approval.
clinical.export.zipHint: Download Turkish and English Word CER files in one ZIP
clinical.cep.title: Clinical Evaluation Plan (CEP)
clinical.cep.hint: MDCG 2020-1 structured plan composed from product profile, literature protocol, equivalence strategy and PMCF. Generate refreshes from live data; export produces FORM-CEP-01 Word/PDF.
clinical.cep.mdcgRef: Reference: MDCG 2020-1 · MDR Annex XIV Part A
clinical.cep.generateDone: CEP updated from product, literature, equivalence and risk data.
clinical.cep.empty: No CEP yet — run MDRpilot generate or complete Literature / Equivalence first.
clinical.cep.exportNote: Word export includes Annex A (literature protocol), B (equivalence), C (PMCF) and evidence screenshots when uploaded.
clinical.cep.export.label: Export CEP
clinical.cep.export.zipHint: Download Turkish and English Word CEP files in one ZIP
clinical.lit.evidenceScreenshotsHint: Upload PubMed or registry search result screenshots (PNG/JPEG). Included in CER export.
clinical.lit.statusFootnotes: ¹ No signal · ² Review required · ³ Records found — hover status for full text.
capa.title: CAPA Register
capa.desc: Track corrective and preventive actions — auditors expect live CAPA records linked to findings.
complaints.title: Complaint Register
complaints.desc: Log and track customer complaints (SOP-CH). CAPA is linked only when required — use FORM-CH-02 separately.
complaints.capaRequiredHint: After saving, open FORM-CH-02 and FORM-CAPA-01 under SOP-CH.
pms.title: PMS / PMCF / PSUR
pms.desc: Post-market surveillance and clinical follow-up, proportionate to device class.
pms.tab.hint: PMS plan (MDR Annex III), PMCF plan (MDCG 2020-7), PMCF report (MDCG 2020-8) and PSUR (MDCG 2022-21) — structured per regulation.
pms.section.missing: Section not found — refresh the page to sync document structure.
pms.survey.title: PMCF user survey (MDCG 2020-7)
pms.survey.hint: Generate a questionnaire for your customers; conduct the survey in the field, then enter results in the PMCF Report tab.
pms.survey.empty: No survey yet — create one with AI to share with clinical users.
pms.survey.resultsHint: After running the questionnaire with customers, record response rate, findings and links to raw data here.
pms.survey.resultsPlaceholder: Reporting period, response rate, key findings…
docTranslator.title: Document Translator
docTranslator.desc: Upload Word, PDF or Excel files and translate them with AI — Turkish, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian or Dutch.
docTranslator.disclaimer: AI translation is a draft — qualified personnel must review before regulatory use.
docTranslator.dropTitle: Drop a file here or click to browse
docTranslator.roleHint: Consultant role or higher is required to run translations.
docTranslator.error: Translation failed. Check AI configuration and try again.
docTranslator.truncated: Document was large — only the first portion was translated.
docTranslator.pdfToWordNote: PDF output is delivered as Word (.docx) to preserve editable text.
docTranslator.pdfLayoutNote: PDF output rebuilds text in a clean layout; original images, tables and exact formatting are not preserved.
docTranslator.pdfLayoutNoteShort: Simplified PDF layout (text translated; original design not preserved)
ifu.title: IFU & Label Generator
ifu.desc: Draft Instructions for Use and a label layout, with risk/IFU alignment checks.
ifu.createDesc: AI drafts IFU (DOCX) and per-model labels (PDF) from your product dossier. Review before release.
ifu.modelSelectDesc: Each catalogue number gets its own label page in the PDF.
ifu.uploadDesc: Upload an existing IFU or label artwork for automatic gap analysis against MDR Annex I Ch. III.
ifu.refPerModel: REF is per model — each variant has its own catalogue number on the physical label.
ifu.previewDesc: AI-generated draft content. Review before release.
ifu.previewEmpty: No IFU content was returned by AI.
ifu.noGeneratedYet: No IFU generated yet. Click "Generate IFU with AI" — content will appear here and the DOCX will download.
ifu.downloadHint: If the download did not start, click the button above.
ifu.downloadError: Download failed. Try the button again.
qms.title: QMS Document Center
qms.desc: ISO 13485 KYS folder tree: manual, procedures, instructions, forms, records and more.
qms.treeDesc: Expand each procedure (SOP) to see linked forms, work instructions, diagrams and related documents underneath.
qms.procedure.expandHint: Expand a procedure to see linked forms, instructions, diagrams, plans and assignments.
qms.procedure.openHint: Open a procedure to manage forms, work instructions, diagrams and records on its own page.
qms.procedure.draftHint: Select a linked document with Open & edit, or forms open automatically after pack creation.
qms.procedure.noChildren: No child documents linked yet — scaffold adds defaults on next KYS visit.
qms.procedure.workspaceDesc: Use the pack button to create all required forms, diagrams and lists in one step. Open any document below to review, download or regenerate with AI.
qms.procedure.linkedDocsHint: After pack creation, the first form opens automatically for filling. You can also open any row below to edit.
qms.edit.formHint: Complete the fields below and save. Use AI generate to refresh the template if needed.
qms.edit.operationalFormHint: When you save, this form is synced to the CAPA or Complaints register automatically. Fill the table fields or add an AI note, then save.
qms.edit.operationalFormHintModule: When you save, this form syncs to the {module} register (Quality Operations), not only the procedure folder. Fill fields or add an AI note, then save.
operational.formPanelHint: Edit the form here, generate with AI, save the record, or download as Word.
operational.noFormYet: No form content yet — use AI generate or fill the fields below
operational.kysNotice: Operational forms and records for this procedure are managed in Quality Operations — not in this procedure workspace.
operational.complaint.capaHint: If CAPA is not required, close using this form. If CAPA is required, also open FORM-CH-02 and FORM-CAPA-01.
operational.complaint.ch02Intro: Use this form only when CAPA is required on FORM-CH-01.
operational.ncp.capaNotRequired: CAPA is not required for this record.
operational.hubDesc: CAPA, complaints, internal audit, NCP, FSCA, vigilance, change control, management review, training and supplier records — synced with KYS forms.
operational.internalAudit.findingsHint: Major/minor items from the checklist — create a linked CAPA per finding.
operational.internalAudit.empty: No internal audit cycles yet. Create a year to start plan, checklist and report.
operational.internalAudit.kysNotice: Internal audit plan, checklist and report are managed in Quality Operations — not in this procedure workspace.
operational.generic.noEditableFields: No editable table fields in this form — use the hint and AI generate.
operational.modules.internalAuditDesc: Annual internal audit cycles — plan (PLAN-IA-01), checklist (FORM-IA-01) and report (REC-IA-01) per year.
operational.modules.capaDesc: FORM-CAPA-01 — corrective and preventive action records (SOP-CAPA).
operational.modules.complaintsDesc: FORM-CH-01 — complaint handling and CAPA linkage (SOP-CH).
operational.modules.fscaDesc: FORM-AN-01 — field safety corrective action cases (SOP-AN).
operational.modules.changeControlDesc: FORM-CC-01 — change requests and impact assessment (SOP-CC).
eqms.trainingMatrix.title: Training competency matrix
eqms.trainingMatrix.desc: SOP revision triggers training requirements per role (ISO 13485 6.2).
eqms.trainingMatrix.empty: No pending competency requirements — approving an SOP creates rows here.
analytics.title: Quality data analysis
analytics.desc: Operational trends for complaints, CAPA, vigilance and calibration (SOP-DA).
qms.procedure.childHintPlaceholder: e.g. Injection machine maintenance WI — brand Arburg, model 320C, monthly lubrication and safety checks…
qms.procedure.extraDesc: Add a company-specific form, instruction, diagram or list under this procedure.
qms.procedure.extra.contextPlaceholder: Describe what to generate: scope, brand/model, steps, fields for the form…
qms.procedure.extra.needInput: Enter a title or description for AI.
qms.folder.empty: No documents in this folder yet.
qms.folder.manualHint: The Quality Manual is generated via the wizard and exported from Composer — it lives in folder 01.
qms.searchPlaceholder: Search by code or title (e.g. SOP-ORG)
audit.title: Audit Readiness
audit.desc: A weighted 0–100 readiness score per device, with the gaps to close before an audit.
files.title: File Center
files.desc: Upload evidence (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, images). AI classifies files and maps them to GSPR evidence.
settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Company profile, team roles and AI configuration.
settings.phase0.title: Phase 0 — Company foundation
settings.phase0.desc: Complete the manufacturer profile first. This data auto-fills the Quality Manual wizard, technical file sections and KYS scope.
settings.phase0.hint: Fill the company profile below. Changes propagate to new wizard sessions and document generation.
settings.phase0.name: Company / trade name
settings.phase0.pathTitle: How will you build your QMS?
settings.phase0.pathDesc: Choose one path. Settings profile feeds both; downstream steps differ.
settings.phase0.path.GREENFIELD.desc: We scaffold ISO 13485 procedures, AI drafts content, you review and approve.
settings.phase0.path.IMPORTED.desc: Upload your current manual and SOPs; we map codes, track revisions and gaps.
settings.phase0.nextChoose: Select a QMS path to see the recommended next step.
settings.phase0.nextGreenfield: Next: run the Quality Manual wizard — we generate the manual and KYS drafts.
settings.phase0.nextImport: Next: upload your documents into KYS using bulk import on the QMS page.
settings.phase0.isoHint: Full ISO 13485 alignment requires procedure bodies in KYS plus a generated manual — not settings alone.
settings.logo.title: Company logo
settings.logo.desc: Upload your company logo. It appears in the top-left of every exported document (PDF/Word).
settings.logo.hint: PNG or JPEG, max 2 MB. A transparent PNG looks best on documents.
settings.logo.invalidType: Logo must be a PNG or JPEG image.
settings.logo.tooLarge: Logo exceeds the 2 MB size limit.
settings.logo.noPermission: Only Quality Managers and Owners can change the company logo.
billing.title: Facturación
landing.hero.title: Prepare su archivo técnico MDR para la auditoría, con trazabilidad incorporada.
landing.hero.subtitle: Estructurar los expedientes del Anexo II/III, mapear la evidencia GSPR, redactar documentos ISO y medir la preparación para la auditoría, antes de que el organismo notificado los revise.
landing.hero.stat2: Espacios de trabajo aislados de la empresa
landing.hero.stat4: UI en 7 idiomas · traductor de documentos
landing.hero.note: Solo redacción y análisis de lagunas; no sustituye a la evaluación del organismo notificado.
landing.problem.title: La deuda de documentación frena el acceso al mercado
landing.problem.body: Los archivos técnicos se encuentran en carpetas y hojas de cálculo dispersas. La evidencia GSPR, los archivos de riesgos y las IFU se concilian manualmente, y las brechas críticas surgen solo cuando el auditor lo solicita.
landing.solution.title: Un expediente controlado, de principio a fin
landing.solution.body: MDRpilot unifica su archivo técnico MDR, sistema de calidad y enlaces de evidencia en un único espacio de trabajo, con historial de versiones, análisis de brechas y una puntuación de preparación en vivo.
landing.features.title: Diseñado para equipos de dispositivos médicos regulados
landing.features.subtitle: Archivos técnicos MDR estructurados, sistemas de calidad ISO 13485 y preparación de auditorías, con evidencia rastreable, una interfaz de usuario en siete idiomas y traducción de documentos mediante IA para los mercados de la UE.
landing.feature.techFile.title: Generador de archivos técnicos MDR
landing.feature.techFile.desc: Genere una estructura de expediente de los Anexos II y III adaptada a su clase de dispositivo, con seguimiento en vivo de la integridad de cada sección.
landing.feature.techFile.h1: Estructura del anexo II/III por perfil de dispositivo
landing.feature.techFile.h2: Estado de la sección y alertas de elementos faltantes
landing.feature.techFile.h3: Paquetes DOCX, PDF y ZIP listos para exportar
landing.feature.gspr.title: Control de evidencia GSPR
landing.feature.gspr.desc: Asigne los requisitos generales de seguridad y rendimiento a la evidencia vinculada y descubra las lagunas antes de la revisión del organismo notificado.
landing.feature.gspr.h1: Mapeo de requisitos a nivel de cláusula
landing.feature.gspr.h2: Evidencias vinculadas a apartados del expediente técnico
landing.feature.risk.title: Archivo de Gestión de Riesgos
landing.feature.risk.desc: Mantenga un flujo de trabajo estructurado ISO 14971 desde la identificación de peligros hasta el riesgo residual, alineado con su diseño y datos clínicos.
landing.feature.risk.h1: Sugerencias de peligros asistidas por IA
landing.feature.risk.h2: Matriz 5×5 y registro de riesgo residual
landing.feature.ai.title: Redactor de documentos consciente de las regulaciones
landing.feature.ai.desc: Borrador de instrucciones de uso, evaluación clínica, PMS/PMCF y procedimientos QMS con indicaciones basadas en MDR e ISO 13485, no texto estándar genérico.
landing.feature.ai.h1: IFU, CER, PMS/PMCF y borradores de procedimientos
landing.feature.ai.h2: Revisión humana e historial de versiones
landing.feature.ai.h3: Tokens medidos con cuotas del plan
landing.feature.translator.title: Traductor de documentos regulatorios
landing.feature.translator.desc: Cargue documentos reglamentarios en Word, Excel o PDF y traduzca con IA preservando la estructura: instrucciones de uso, procedimientos y anexos técnicos para expedientes multimercado.
landing.feature.translator.h1: Compatible con TR, EN, DE, FR, ES, IT y NL
landing.feature.translator.h2: DOCX, XLSX y PDF en → exportación estructurada
landing.feature.translator.h3: Detección automática del idioma de origen
landing.feature.languages.title: Soporte de plataforma y lenguaje de salida
landing.feature.languages.desc: Trabaje en turco, inglés, alemán, francés, español, italiano u holandés en la interfaz de usuario; Los borradores generados por IA siguen su idioma, mientras que las referencias MDR, ISO y anexos permanecen en formato estándar.
landing.feature.languages.h1: Espacio de trabajo en siete idiomas con un solo clic
landing.feature.languages.h2: Salidas de IA alineadas con el lenguaje de la interfaz de usuario
landing.feature.languages.h3: Los identificadores regulatorios nunca se traducen mal
landing.feature.audit.title: Preparación y simulación de auditoría
landing.feature.audit.desc: Una puntuación de preparación en vivo por expediente de producto, acciones priorizadas y un simulador de auditoría interna, para que nada le sorprenda el día de la auditoría.
landing.feature.audit.h1: Índice de preparación de 0 a 100 por producto
landing.feature.audit.h3: Simulación de preguntas y respuestas al estilo del cuerpo notificado
landing.feature.qms.title: Sistema de Calidad ISO 13485
landing.feature.qms.desc: Un centro de documentación controlado para los procedimientos obligatorios del SGC, aprobaciones y su manual de calidad, listo para auditorías desde el primer día.
landing.feature.qms.h2: Control de documentos y flujo de aprobación
landing.feature.internalAudit.title: Internal Audit Cycles
landing.feature.internalAudit.desc: Annual internal audit plan, checklist and report per year — with major/minor findings linked straight to CAPA.
landing.feature.internalAudit.h1: PLAN-IA / FORM-IA / REC-IA per audit year
landing.feature.internalAudit.h2: Clause checklist with OK, minor and major NC
landing.feature.calibration.title: Calibration & Measuring Equipment
landing.feature.calibration.desc: Track measuring devices, calibration due dates and equipment records — aligned with SOP-ME and FORM-ME-01.
landing.feature.calibration.h1: Equipment register with next calibration date
landing.feature.qualityOps.title: CAPA, Complaints & Post-Market
landing.feature.qualityOps.desc: Live operational registers for CAPA, complaints, vigilance, traceability and training competency — closure loops built in.
landing.feature.qualityOps.h3: Training competency matrix per SOP revision
landing.modules.title: Un paquete para el expediente regulatorio completo
landing.modules.subtitle: Cada módulo comparte el mismo contexto del producto, enlaces de evidencia y seguimiento de auditoría, sin entrada de datos duplicados.
landing.module.techFile.title: Ficha Técnica
landing.module.techFile.desc: Estructura de los anexos II y III con seguimiento del estado a nivel de sección
landing.module.gspr.title: Lista de verificación GSPR
landing.module.gspr.desc: Mapeo de cláusulas, enlaces de evidencia y alertas de pruebas faltantes
landing.module.risk.title: Gestión de riesgos
landing.module.risk.desc: Registro de peligros, matriz 5×5 y trazabilidad de riesgos residuales
landing.module.clinical.title: Evaluación clínica
landing.module.clinical.desc: Estructura del CER, revisión de la literatura y seguimiento de equivalencias.
landing.module.pms.title: PMS/PMCF/PSUR
landing.module.pms.desc: Planes poscomercialización, ganchos de vigilancia y alineación del PMCF
landing.module.ifu.title: Instrucciones de uso y etiquetado
landing.module.ifu.desc: Borradores de instrucciones de uso y comprobaciones de cumplimiento de etiquetas.
landing.module.qms.title: Documentos del SGC
landing.module.qms.desc: 18 trámites obligatorios con flujo de trabajo de control de documentos
landing.module.translator.title: Traductor de documentos
landing.module.translator.desc: Traducción mediante IA para DOCX, XLSX y PDF con exportación basada en el diseño
landing.module.languages.title: Espacio de trabajo multilingüe
landing.module.languages.desc: Cambie la interfaz de usuario entre TR, EN, DE, FR, ES, IT y NL; etiquetas de exportación alineadas
landing.module.export.title: Centro de exportación
landing.module.export.desc: Archivo técnico ZIP, listas de verificación, archivos de riesgos y paquetes de auditoría
landing.pricing.title: Precios simples y transparentes
landing.pricing.subtitle: Comience gratis, actualice cuando escale.
landing.plan.plus.f2: IA en vivo · ~1,5 millones de tokens/mes
landing.plan.pro.f2: IA en vivo · ~2,5 millones de tokens/mes
landing.plan.ent.f2: Flujo de trabajo de revisión del consultor
landing.faq.title: Preguntas frecuentes
landing.support.title: Need help? Talk to our team
landing.support.subtitle: Technical questions, billing, onboarding or regulatory workflow — send us a message and we will help you move forward quickly.
landing.support.point1: Direct line to the MDRpilot team — no ticket maze.
landing.support.point2: Typical reply within one business day.
landing.support.point3: Logged-in users also reach support from Help in the app sidebar.
landing.faq.a1: No. MDRpilot produce borradores, análisis de brechas y listas de verificación. Las decisiones reglamentarias finales quedan en manos de su persona calificada y del organismo notificado.
landing.faq.a2: MDR 2017/745, ISO 13485, ISO 9001, ISO 14971, además de estándares referenciados como ISO 10993, ISO 11607 e IEC 62304.
landing.faq.a3: Sí. Cada empresa está completamente aislada; ninguna empresa puede acceder a los archivos o documentos de otra persona. Las claves AI nunca llegan al navegador.
landing.faq.a4: Sí. Un motor simulado determinista ejecuta toda la plataforma sin conexión, con un elegante respaldo si falla un proveedor en vivo.
landing.cta.title: ¿Listo para acelerar su documentación MDR?
landing.cta.subtitle: Abra la plataforma con datos de demostración realistas y explore cada módulo hoy.
brand.slogan: Cumplimiento impulsado por IA. Mañanas seguras.
brand.certLine: MDR · ISO 13485 · CE · Calidad · Listo para auditoría

auth.login.subtitle: Inicie sesión en su espacio de trabajo de MDRpilot.
auth.register.title: Crea tu cuenta
auth.register.subtitle: Comience a preparar la documentación lista para la auditoría.
auth.register.name: nombre completo
auth.register.mustAccept: Debes aceptar los términos y política de privacidad.
auth.forgot.title: Restablecer contraseña
auth.forgot.subtitle: Le enviaremos por correo electrónico un enlace de restablecimiento si la cuenta existe.
auth.forgot.sent: Si existe una cuenta, se envió un enlace de restablecimiento. Revise su bandeja de entrada (o los registros del servidor en dev).
auth.reset.title: Elija una nueva contraseña
auth.reset.subtitle: Ingrese una nueva contraseña para su cuenta.
auth.reset.invalid: Enlace de restablecimiento no válido o faltante.
auth.verify.title: Verificación de correo electrónico
auth.verify.failed: El enlace de verificación no es válido o ha caducado.
auth.checkEmail.title: Revisa tu correo electrónico
auth.checkEmail.subtitle: Enviamos un enlace de verificación. Confirme su correo electrónico antes de utilizar MDRpilot. Revisa el spam si no lo ves en unos minutos.
auth.checkEmail.resendFailed: No se pudo reenviar el correo electrónico de verificación.
auth.checkEmail.alreadyVerified: Tu correo electrónico ya está verificado.
auth.onboarding.title: Configura tu empresa
auth.onboarding.subtitle: Usamos esto para adaptar los requisitos MDR/ISO a su organización.
auth.side.title: Documentación MDR, ISO 13485 e ISO 9001: estructurada, rastreable y lista para auditorías.
auth.side.subtitle: Archivos técnicos, listas de verificación GSPR, archivos de riesgo ISO 14971 y documentos QMS con un asistente de IA que encuentra sus brechas.
auth.side.note: Solo redacción y análisis de lagunas; no sustituye a la evaluación del organismo notificado.
landing.flow.title: Del producto a lo listo para auditoría en un solo flujo
landing.flow.subtitle: Un camino guiado que sigue tu equipo en la plataforma.

landing.bookdemo.subtitle: Abra la demostración guiada o reserve un recorrido con nuestro equipo.
ai.title: AI Analysis
ai.subtitle: AI-assisted draft & gap analysis
ai.analyzingHint: Large models may take 1–2 minutes. Keep this tab open.
ai.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check that the app is running (http://localhost:3000) and refresh the page.
assistant.title: AI Regulatory Assistant
assistant.greeting:
Hi, I'm your MDRpilot regulatory assistant.

I can help you find gaps, draft documents and prepare for audits.

**Example topics:**
- MDR technical file and GSPR
- ISO 14971 risk management
- PMS / PMCF plan and PMCF report
- CER and literature search
assistant.error: Sorry, I couldn't reach the assistant service.
assistant.sg1: Is this product Class IIa or IIb?
assistant.sg2: What is missing in my technical file?
assistant.sg3: Which validations are required for an EO-sterile device?
assistant.sg4: Am I ready for an ISO 13485 audit?
common.aiDraftNotice: Borrador generado por IA. Requiere revisión y aprobación por parte de personal regulatorio/de calidad calificado.
exports.desc: Generate, download and manage MDR / ISO 13485 document exports.
exports.empty.title: No exports yet
exports.empty.descCreate: Create your first export to generate a downloadable file.
exports.empty.descView: Exports created by your team will appear here.
qms.download.enDocNoHint: English exports use document no. suffix -EN (e.g. ASG-PRRC-01-EN).
qms.bulkGenerate.serverNote: Using wizard profile context — this may take several minutes.
qms.greenfield.hint: Greenfield path: complete the Quality Manual wizard first, then use “Generate all KYS with AI” for scoped procedure drafts.
qms.imported.hint: Imported path: upload your existing Word/PDF files below. Codes are matched from filenames (e.g. SOP-CH.docx).
qms.import.title: Import existing KYS documents
qms.import.desc: Upload Word or PDF files. We match SOP-/FORM-/WI- codes from the file name and track import in revision history.
eqms.import.redirectHint: Upload controlled documents inside each procedure folder (e.g. SOP-AN → open procedure → Upload). No central bulk import — each file lands in the correct KYS location with revision tracking.
eqms.upload.procedureDesc: Word/PDF files are matched to this procedure and its forms, WIs and lists. Revision history is updated automatically.
eqms.upload.status.unmatched: No code match in this procedure
eqms.revision.title: Revision history
eqms.revision.empty: Snapshots appear when content is saved, imported or revised.
eqms.reminder.title: eQMS actions due
eqms.reminder.none: No overdue CAPA, operational or document review items.
eqms.meta.title: Document control dates
eqms.meta.lockedHint: This document is approved. Saving edits starts a new revision (IN_REVIEW) and preserves the original issue date.
eqms.meta.revisionConfirm: This approved document will move to IN_REVIEW with a new revision. Continue?
eqms.notify.title: Notifications
eqms.create.title: Create custom procedure
eqms.create.desc: Describe your process in plain language. AI drafts a new SOP (SOP-CUS-XX) in the selected language.
eqms.create.promptPlaceholder: Describe scope, roles, inputs/outputs, records and ISO clauses…
qms.coverage.title: ISO 13485 clause coverage
qms.operational.result: {filled} docs filled · {samples} sample records · {content} with content · {empty} still empty
qms.draftHint: Select “Draft with AI” on any document to generate a draft.
qms.generate.error: Could not generate document. Please try again.
qms.generate.aiFallback: Live AI was not used — a template draft was saved instead. Restart the dev server after .env changes, or check API key / model settings.
qms.generate.fallback.provider_error_or_: Live AI response could not be processed — template draft was used.
qms.generate.fallback.mock_or_no_provide: Template mode — AI provider is not configured or mock mode is active.
docRegister.title: Document Register
docRegister.desc: Track revisions, first issue dates and status for technical file, ISO 13485 and ISO 9001 documents.
docRegister.emptyTf: No technical file sections for this product.
qms.status.err.content: Create or import document content before review or approval.
qms.status.err.approveRole: Quality Manager role is required to approve QMS documents.
composer.lockedNote: Este documento está aprobado y bloqueado. Utilice "Nueva revisión" para crear una copia BORRADOR editable.
composer.draftDisclaimer: Borrador para revisión únicamente, no una determinación regulatoria.
standards.copyrightNote: Copyright note: full ISO standard texts are NOT stored. Only paraphrased clause summaries, public regulation references and content you upload are used. Upload only standards your company is licensed to use; they stay private to your company.
standards.confirmDelete: Delete this standard? This removes its indexed knowledge:
standards.noClauses: No indexed clauses for this document. Its full text is used for RAG retrieval.
standards.title: Title
standards.privateNote: Uploaded content stays private to your company and is used only for your RAG retrieval.
evidence.noFiles: No more files available to link. Upload evidence in the File Center first.
files.dropzone: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
files.dropHintA: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PNG, JPG — max
files.dropHintB: MB. Stored privately, scoped to your company, analyzed by AI.
files.duplicate: Note: looks identical to an existing file:
files.viewOnly: You have view-only access. Uploading requires the Consultant role or higher.
files.promptInjection: File text is treated as untrusted data. The AI never executes instructions found inside uploaded documents (prompt-injection protection).
composer.listDisclaimer: AI Composer solo produce BORRADORES de calidad de consultor. Una persona calificada debe revisar, completar y aprobar cada documento antes de su uso. No otorga aprobación regulatoria.
composer.instrPlaceholder: p.ej. enfatizar los controles de esterilización con OE
settings.companyProfileHint: Filled once here, this manufacturer information is pulled automatically into technical-file sections (e.g. Manufacturer Identification).
settings.nbSearch: Search notified body by name or number…
settings.nbHint: Pick from the list to auto-fill name + number, or type manually. Always verify against EUDAMED/NANDO.
settings.companySaveError: Could not save the company profile. Please try again.
settings.aiConfigDescA: The platform runs on a deterministic mock engine by default. To enable live drafting, set
settings.aiConfigDescC: The key never reaches the browser.
settings.logo.missingFile: Logo file is missing on the server. Please upload it again.
demo.title: Demostración guiada
demo.landing.authTitle: Inicia sesión para iniciar la visita guiada
demo.landing.authDesc: La demostración guiada se ejecuta dentro de su espacio de trabajo con datos de muestra. Cree una cuenta o inicie sesión; no ingresará al panel de la aplicación hasta que se autentique.
demo.landing.h1: 12 pasos guiados entre QMS, expediente técnico, consultor y exportaciones
demo.landing.h2: Escenario Yılmaz Bio precargado con lagunas deliberadas para explorar
demo.landing.h3: Marque los pasos completos a medida que avanza por el flujo de trabajo
demo.landing.h4: Utiliza los mismos módulos que la producción, no una interfaz de usuario simulada separada
demo.desc: Un viaje de 12 pasos: la columna vertebral del SGC de la empresa, el primer expediente de producto, el cierre de brechas y las exportaciones listas para la auditoría.
demo.scenarioDesc: Descripción sólida del dispositivo, riesgo parcial y GSPR, borrador de instrucciones de uso y manual de calidad, con lagunas deliberadas en biocompatibilidad, validación de esterilización y residual de EO, vida útil, PMS/PMCF y 2 CAPA abiertos.
demo.s0.title: 1. Perfil de empresa (Configuración)
demo.s0.desc: Nombre legal completo, sitios, organismo notificado y mercados: esto alimenta KYS, el asistente del Manual de calidad y los archivos técnicos.
demo.s0.expected: Perfil de la empresa guardado; Los mismos datos aparecen en el paso 1 del asistente.
demo.s0.tip: Diga: "Un registro de la empresa controla cada módulo, no es necesario volver a escribirlo".
demo.s0b.title: 2. Columna vertebral de KYS
demo.s0b.desc: Abra el registro del QMS, revise los procedimientos andamiados y luego use IA masiva o aplique el alcance desde el asistente del Manual de calidad.
demo.s0b.expected: Lista de procedimientos visible; Los POE básicos se pueden redactar teniendo en cuenta el contexto de la empresa.
demo.s0b.tip: Muestre el estado MISSING en el andamio: aquí se crea el contenido, no solo los códigos.
demo.s0c.title: 3. Asistente del Manual de Calidad
demo.s0c.desc: Establezca el alcance en los pasos 1 y 2, asigne roles, ejecute una verificación de brechas, aplique el alcance a KYS y luego genere el manual a partir de los datos del asistente.
demo.s0c.expected: Borrador del Manual de calidad de varias secciones (no un esqueleto de una sola página) con referencias a los procedimientos.
demo.s0c.tip: Elija turco al generar: los datos del asistente deberían aparecer en los cuerpos de las secciones.
demo.s0c.cta: Abrir el asistente de gestión de calidad
demo.s1.title: 4. Seleccione el producto de demostración
demo.s1.descB: para ver su expediente completo: descripción del dispositivo, archivo de riesgos, lista de verificación GSPR, instrucciones de uso y más.
demo.s1.expected: Descripción general del producto con archivo técnico, GSPR y pestañas de riesgo completas.
demo.s1.tip: Señale que la descripción del dispositivo y el archivo de riesgos son sólidos, pero faltan pruebas en algunos lugares.
demo.s2.title: 5. Ejecute el consultor de cumplimiento
demo.s2.desc: Seleccione el dispositivo y el alcance 'Combinado', luego haga clic en Analizar cumplimiento para calificar el expediente y enumerar cada brecha.
demo.s2.expected: Puntuación general con subpuntuaciones de categorías, una lista de brechas clasificadas, las 5 acciones principales y una hoja de ruta de 30 días.
demo.s2.tip: Deje que la audiencia vea aparecer la partitura: enmarca toda la conversación en torno a la preparación.
demo.s3.title: 6. Muestre las brechas críticas
demo.s3.desc: Analice los hallazgos críticos: falta de biocompatibilidad, validación de esterilización y residual de AE, validación de vida útil y síndrome premenstrual débil.
demo.s3.expected: Lagunas críticas/importantes en las referencias a cláusulas, por qué son importantes y acciones recomendadas.
demo.s3.tip: Haga hincapié en las citas a nivel de cláusula: esto es lo que solicitan los auditores y los organismos notificados.
demo.s4.title: 7. Cargue las pruebas faltantes
demo.s4.desc: Cargue un informe de prueba de biocompatibilidad o esterilización para vincularlo como evidencia.
demo.s4.expected: Un nuevo archivo en la biblioteca de Archivos con un resumen de IA.
demo.s4.tip: Cualquier PDF funciona para la demostración; El resumen de IA se genera automáticamente.
demo.s5.title: 8. Vincular la evidencia al GSPR
demo.s5.desc: Vincule el archivo cargado a un requisito de GSPR (por ejemplo, biocompatibilidad 10.1) para cerrar la brecha de evidencia.
demo.s5.expected: El elemento GSPR pasa de MISSING a vinculado/aprobado.
demo.s5.tip: Vuelva a ejecutar el consultor luego para mostrar que la puntuación mejora en tiempo real.
demo.s6.title: 9. Genera documentos con AI Composer
demo.s6.desc: Redacte una IFU o un manual de calidad con IA, precargado desde el expediente y la biblioteca de estándares.
demo.s6.expected: Un borrador estructurado con referencias regulatorias y una lista de verificación de revisión.
demo.s6.tip: Resalte la insignia de confianza 'Borrador de IA · necesita revisión': nada se aprueba automáticamente.
demo.s7.title: 10. Ejecute el Simulador de Auditoría
demo.s7.desc: Iniciar una auditoría Estándar según ISO 13485/MDR. Responda las preguntas del auditor y complete la sesión.
demo.s7.expected: Una puntuación de auditoría con hallazgos mayores/menores y sugerencias CAPA.
demo.s7.tip: El dispositivo de demostración se prepara para producir al menos un hallazgo mayor y otro menor.
demo.s8.title: 11. Exportar el informe de auditoría/ejecutivo
demo.s8.desc: Exporte el informe de auditoría (PDF) y el Informe Ejecutivo en PDF para liderazgo.
demo.s8.expected: Informes descargables listados en el Centro de exportación.
demo.s8.tip: Abra el PDF en vivo: incluye el puntaje de preparación, las brechas principales, el plan de 30 días y un argumento de retorno de la inversión.
demo.s9.title: 12. Mostrar el panel ejecutivo
demo.s9.desc: Termine con la visión de toda la empresa: cumplimiento general, productos en riesgo, CAPA abierta, hallazgos y tendencias.
demo.s9.expected: KPI ejecutivos y gráficos de tendencias, además de un PDF de informe ejecutivo con un solo clic.
demo.s9.tip: Esta es la diapositiva para el CEO/Director de Calidad: todo el programa de un vistazo.
qmWizard.lockedGenerated: This wizard has generated a document and is now read-only.
qmWizard.proceduresAutoFill: Procedure codes are filled automatically from your KYS register (e.g. SOP-DC, SOP-ORG, SOP-CAPA).
qmWizard.kysContentAutoFill: Empty fields are filled from matching KYS procedures when content exists. Edit as needed.
qmWizard.processMapAutoFill: Process map fields are filled from your KYS register and scope (steps 1–2). Only empty fields are updated.
qmWizard.runGapHint: Run a gap check to validate completeness before generating.
qmWizard.org.wordHint: Upload your roles & responsibilities Word document (.docx). Edit roles in Word — the wizard reads the file automatically.
qmWizard.org.syncedFromWord: Loaded from Word — edit the file and upload again to update.
qmWizard.org.noStructure: No organization text yet — upload your roles & responsibilities Word file.
qmWizard.org.rolesReadonly: Filled automatically from Word. To add or remove roles, edit the Word file and re-upload.
qmWizard.org.manualFallback: Or enter role holders manually below if you do not have a Word file yet.
qmWizard.org.aiSectionTitle: No Word file? Fill names below
qmWizard.org.aiSectionHint: Enter the person or title for each role, then generate organization structure, chart and responsibilities with AI.
qmWizard.org.generatedByAi: Generated by AI — edit names and regenerate, or upload Word instead.
qmWizard.org.rolesFillHint: Enter name/title for each role. Required: General manager, Management representative and Quality manager.
qmWizard.org.aiOrWord: Use Word upload above OR fill roles and click Generate with AI.
qmWizard.org.fromSopOrg: Organization structure, chart and role definitions are loaded from SOP-ORG in KYS. Enter assignee names below; formal assignment will use FOR-ORG later.
qmWizard.completeOrProceedA: You can complete the missing items above, or proceed to Generate — unknown fields will be drafted as
qmWizard.gapsRemain: critical gap(s) remain — they will be drafted as [TO BE CONFIRMED].
qmWizard.gapReadySummary: No critical wizard/KYS gaps. {kys} procedure(s) still need content in KYS.
qmWizard.gapActionSummary: {count} actionable critical item(s) — fix wizard fields or author KYS procedures below.
qmWizard.kysContentHint: These procedures are in the register but have no content yet. Fill them in KYS to auto-fill wizard fields.
qmWizard.auditorNotesHint: AI suggestions only — not counted as critical gaps. Review after fixing items above.
qmWizard.applyScopeFailed: Could not apply scope guidance to KYS.
qmGap.production_required: Step 5: production is in scope but Production Control Procedure (SOP-PC) is not referenced.
qmGap.sterile_no_sterilization_proc: Sterile products are in scope but Sterilization Procedure (SOP-ST) is not referenced.
qmGap.design_scope_document: Design is in scope — author SOP-DD and SOP-CRP content in KYS.
qmGap.method_field_empty: Step {step}: "{label}" is empty — enter in wizard or fill the linked procedure in KYS.
qmGap.method_needs_kys_content: Step {step}: "{label}" is empty because {code} has no content in KYS — author the procedure first.
qmGap.method_field_empty_sync: Step {step}: "{label}" is empty although {code} has content — re-save wizard or paste summary manually.
qmGap.distribution_design_conflict: Both "distribution only" and "design & development included" are yes — clarify scope in step 2.
qmGap.sterile_method_mismatch: Sterile products are not in scope but sterilization method "{method}" is set — align step 2 and 7.
qmGap.standard_mode_mismatch: Standard mode is ISO 9001 but applicable standards mention ISO 13485 — consider BOTH mode.
qmGap.design_dhf_reminder: Design is in scope — ensure design controls and DHF references appear in the manual.
qmStep.companyProfile.title: Company Profile

qmStep.qmsScope.title: QMS Scope

qmStep.organization.desc: Assign role holders here. Structure, chart and responsibilities come from SOP-ORG in KYS when available.

qmStep.processMap.desc: Core, support and management processes and their interactions.
qmStep.procedures.title: Documented Procedures
qmStep.procedures.desc: Reference the procedure codes that implement each requirement. Existing QMS documents are shown for reference.
qmStep.riskCompliance.title: Risk & Compliance
qmStep.riskCompliance.desc: Quality and regulatory risks and the applicable framework.
qmStep.productionContext.title: Product & Production Context
qmStep.productionContext.desc: Manufacturing, sterilization, traceability and validation context.
qmStep.customerPms.title: Customer / PMS / Complaint / CAPA
qmStep.customerPms.desc: Feedback, surveillance and corrective action methods.
qmStep.review.title: Review & Gap Check
qmStep.review.desc: Run a consultant-style gap check before generating the manual.
qmStep.generate.title: Generate
qmStep.generate.desc: Generate the Quality Manual draft via AI Composer.
qmField.mdrConformityRoute.help: e.g. Annex IX QMS + technical documentation.
qmField.scopeStatement.help: The activities the QMS certificate will cover.
billing.renewInfo: 149 € / mes · renueva en 18 días · 3 de 25 productos usados
billing.f.tokens3m: ~1,5 millones de tokens de IA/mes (3 expedientes completos)
billing.f.tokens5m: ~2,5 millones de tokens de IA/mes (5 expedientes completos)
billing.stripeSoon: Pago en línea (Stripe) disponible en la próxima versión.
billing.tokens.title: fichas de IA
billing.tokens.desc: El uso de IA en vivo está medido. Un expediente de producto completo (TR+EN, todos los módulos una vez) ≈ 500.000 tokens.
billing.tokens.starterHint: Starter utiliza el motor de IA simulado. Actualice a Basic, Plus o Pro para disfrutar de IA en vivo.
billing.tokens.starterNoPurchase: Los paquetes de fichas adicionales no están disponibles en Starter. Actualice a Básico o superior para comprar tokens.
billing.tokens.upgradeRequired: Actualice su plan para comprar este paquete.
billing.tokens.ownerOnly: Sólo el propietario de la empresa puede comprar paquetes de fichas.
billing.tokens.pilotNote: Modo piloto: las compras se acreditan instantáneamente sin pago. Pago de Stripe próximamente.
billing.tokens.purchaseSuccess: Paquete de tokens agregado a su cuenta.
billing.tokens.purchaseFailed: No se pudo comprar el paquete de tokens.
billing.annual.save: Ahorre un {pct} % en comparación con el mes
billing.annual.note: Facturado anualmente: pague 10 meses y obtenga 12.
billing.plansIntro: Compare planes y cambie cuando el pago esté disponible.

team.title: Team & seats
team.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the team?
team.invite.title: Team invitation
team.invite.subtitle: Accept to join the workspace on MDRpilot.
team.invite.loginHint: Sign in with the email address that received the invite.
evaluation.title: AI Quality Scorecard
evaluation.desc: Benchmark the real AI against a golden regulatory dataset: accuracy, citations, hallucination and how close it gets to a human consultant.
evaluation.mockNote: No live AI key is configured — scores reflect the deterministic baseline engine. Set AI_PROVIDER + AI_API_KEY to benchmark a real model.
evaluation.compareHint: Configure both OPENAI_API_KEY and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to compare providers.
evaluation.running: Running the benchmark across golden cases — this calls the live model and may take a moment…
evaluation.headline: Headline scores
evaluation.costEstimate: Cost is an estimate (providers do not return token usage through the text contract); latency is measured.
evaluation.proximityVerdict: Today this system is approximately this close to a real ISO 13485 / MDR consultant:
evaluation.proximityNote: Capped below 100% by design: the tool produces drafts and detects gaps but does not carry the legal accountability or final judgement of a qualified human consultant.
